questions.question: In March 2025, what important decision did the Supreme Court of India make regarding disability rights?
questions.option_1: It banned all exams for persons with disabilities.
questions.option_2: It allowed only private companies to hire persons with disabilities.
questions.option_3: It said disability rights are a part of fundamental rights.
questions.option_4: It removed reservations for persons with disabilities.

questions.question: In the 'Suresh v. State Rep. by Inspector of Police case (March 2025)', what did the Supreme Court rule regarding ‘dying declarations’?
questions.option_1: Dying declarations are inadmissible in court.
questions.option_2: Suspicious dying declarations require corroborative evidence.
questions.option_4: Dying declarations are sacrosanct and do not require any supporting evidence.

questions.question: Which city will host the Web Summit 2025 from 10 to 13 November?

questions.option_1: To develop a new mode of transportation for goods
questions.option_3: To test the feasibility of vacuum tube technology
questions.option_4: To revolutionise high-speed transportation and reduce travel time

questions.question: What is the length of the hyperloop test track launched by IIT Madras in 2025?

questions.option_1: Leader in the anti-emergency protest movement
questions.option_2: Leader in the Bhoodan land reform movement
questions.option_3: Defence researcher in Post Independent India

questions.question: In March 2025, the Indian government passed the Waqf (Amendment) Act, leading to nationwide protests. Which organisation led the protests, calling the bill "unconstitutional and undemocratic"?
questions.option_1: All India Shia Personal Law Board
questions.option_3: All India Muslim Personal Law Board

questions.question: What is the primary objective of 'Srjanam', the biomedical waste conversion system launched in 2025?
questions.option_1: To promote traditional biomedical waste disposal methods
questions.option_2: To reduce environmental hazards by eliminating incineration
questions.option_3: To increase the use of landfills for biomedical waste
questions.option_4: To develop a new method for incineration
